task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (GUI or terminal-based like nano/vim) is open and the active file is explicitly shown as 'Muncie.x04'.

task_completion.description: Locate the first cross-section's Manning's/Roughness Data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the text cursor or viewport positioned at or immediately below the first occurrence of a header similar to 'Section - XS Manning's/Roughness Data'.

task_completion.description: Identify the specific line containing the roughness coefficients
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line containing the initial values '0     .07  250.23     .04  401.13     .07' is visible on the screen within the first cross-section block.

task_completion.description: Change the main channel n-value to 0.05
task_completion.visual_evidence: The middle roughness value on the target line is changed from .04 to 0.05 (or .05). The line should now look like '0     .07  250.23     0.05  401.13     .07' or similar.
The text editor tab or window title for 'Muncie.x04' no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (such as a dot or asterisk), or a successful save message/command is visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the actual Muncie.x04 file and not a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path or tab name clearly indicates 'Muncie.x04' is the file being edited and saved, not a newly created text file with a different name.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent only changed the main channel value and did not corrupt the overbank values or station data
integrity.visual_evidence: The left and right overbank values (.07) and the station values (250.23, 401.13) on the edited line remain completely unchanged.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not blindly replace all instances of .04 in the file
integrity.visual_evidence: If visible, other cross-sections or lines containing '.04' should remain unchanged. The edit should be localized to the first cross-section.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial main channel Manning's n-value for the first cross-section in Muncie.x04 is 0.04. The relevant line originally reads '       0     .07  250.23     .04  401.13     .07'. The correct action is to change the .04 to 0.05 (or .05) on this specific line. The left and right overbank values (.07) must remain unchanged.
